changeSet.author: practice-target-type-constraint

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_finding WHERE target_type NOT IN ('pull_request', 'PULL_REQUEST')

changeSet.sql: UPDATE practice_finding SET target_type = 'PULL_REQUEST' WHERE target_type = 'pull_request';
changeSet.rollback: UPDATE practice_finding SET target_type = 'pull_request' WHERE target_type = 'PULL_REQUEST';

changeSet.author: practice-target-type-constraint
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE practice_finding DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_practice_finding_target_type;
